description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a modern L-shaped kitchen layout with both upper and lower cabinets in a light wood finish. The upper section includes multiple wall-mounted cabinets, some with open shelving and others with solid doors, providing a mix of storage and display space. The lower section incorporates a countertop with an integrated sink, base cabinets, and a peninsula that extends into the room, offering additional workspace and storage. The cabinetry is designed with clean lines and minimalistic hardware, contributing to a contemporary aesthetic. The visible handles are sleek and horizontally oriented, complementing the overall streamlined look. The cabinetry is set against a plain wall, emphasizing its modular and functional design suitable for urban interiors.
description: A modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set with light wood finish, upper and lower cabinets, integrated sink, and sleek horizontal handles. Features both closed storage and open shelving for a contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full L-shaped layout, upper and lower cabinets, integrated sink, and peninsula with open shelving.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the peninsula and the arrangement of upper cabinets along the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the cabinetry and wall, with no visible cabinet features.
description_view_3: End view displaying the side panel of the peninsula and a glimpse of the upper cabinets' depth.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen base and wall cabinets
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double door, single door, and open shelf
